subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket and dark blue jeans, stepping off the curb to cross the residential street directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small backpack with cartoon characters, wears light-up sneakers, has tousled hair
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded jacket, dark blue jeans, light-up sneakers, cartoon backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.facial_features: Round face, dark brown short hair, small features, rosy cheeks

subjects.description: Parked passenger cars lining both sides of the quiet residential street
subjects.appearance_details: A mix of sedans and SUVs in muted colors, clean and modern, parked along the curb
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A calm suburban residential neighborhood on a clear sunny day. Single-family houses with tidy lawns, low fences, and mature trees line both sides of a two-lane asphalt street. Driveways, mailboxes, and parked cars dot the scene. Sidewalks run along both edges, with a grassy verge between the curb and the homes. The road surface is smooth with faded center lane markings, and consistent crisp shadows fall from the trees and rooftops onto the pavement.

lighting.direction: Sunlight from the upper left, slightly behind and to the side
lighting.shadows: Sharp, consistent shadows cast by trees, houses, and parked cars onto the road and sidewalk
lighting.illumination_effect: Even, high-visibility illumination that brightens the scene and gives strong contrast between sunlit pavement and shaded areas

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Warm sunlit greens of lawns and trees, gray asphalt, muted house tones, and a striking red accent from the child's jacket
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Calm everyday driving abruptly heightened by sudden caution and tension
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating parked cars, evenly spaced trees, and fence posts along the street

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the road ahead and the crossing child

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the quiet residential street.
A small child in a red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking, decelerating noticeably as the nose dips slightly.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the asphalt, partially faded
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward through the sunny residential street with parked cars on both sides.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps off the sidewalk into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking and decelerates rapidly.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears; speed drops sharply, nose dips under braking
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and remains stationary as the child crosses safely.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view moves smoothly forward down a sunlit residential street lined with parked cars and trees. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking, the view slowing rapidly with a slight forward pitch. By 0:03 the vehicle has come to a complete stop well before reaching the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it remains fully stopped while the child continues across the road safely.
audio_description: Ambient suburban sounds of a light breeze and distant birds, the steady hum of the vehicle, followed by the distinct sound of firm tire and brake friction as the car decelerates, then silence of the idling stopped vehicle with faint environmental noise.
